message:
fix(build): Detect CI environment to disable AVX-512 in libdeflate

The conditional AVX-512 detection was incorrectly enabling AVX-512 code
in CI environments, causing compilation errors:

  error: always_inline function '_mm512_set_epi64' requires target
  feature 'evex512', but would be inlined into function that is
  compiled without support for 'evex512'

Root cause:
- CI runners report cpu_model as 'native' on x86_64
- is_native_x86 evaluates to true in CI
- AVX-512 disabling flags not applied
- Compilation fails on Ubuntu runners without EVEX512

Fix:
- Use std.process.hasEnvVarConstant("CI") to detect CI environment
- Disable AVX-512 when CI=true (set automatically by GitHub Actions)
- Enable AVX-512 only for native x86_64 builds outside CI
- Preserves AVX-512 optimization for local development

Fixes metal0 @core2 hanging issue.
